subject: grammar
title: Prepositions: Mistake correction
instruction: Find the wrong preposition in each sentence, underline it (identify) and write the correction. Type '✓' if the sentence is correct.

questions.text: There has been a rise in the number of people buying their own homes.
It is not difficult to distinguish amongst the emotional response to this crime and the law's response.
There is no need about a new school in this area.
We want the government to promise to make a change in the law.
I hate the way she always laughs to people.
I've decided to apply to that job in the newspaper.
Professor Ho has a good knowledge about his subject.
I'm afraid I broke this glass in accident.
My husband's staying at my cousin while he is on business in America.
I gave him one of my paintings in return for his help when I moved house.
Why do governments always insist in doing things that are unpopular?
When I was in school I did much more sport than I do these days.
